visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing glasses and a blue denim-textured flat cap, is positioned in the center of the frame. He wears a light green Athletics t-shirt with visible logos. His facial expressions are animated and friendly as he talks directly to the camera. He holds a light green iPhone in his right hand. The background is a stark, clean white wall with bright, even studio lighting that eliminates harsh shadows. (2) The man continues to hold the light green iPhone while presenting a matching light green silicone Apple-branded phone case to the viewer. He performs a physical action of snapping the mobile device into the protective case. His hands and fingers are clearly visible, showing precision in the movement and the physical texture of the objects. The setting remains the same indoor studio environment with consistent bright illumination. (3) The visual shifts to a direct screen capture of the iPhone user interface. A finger is visible as it interacts with the touch screen. It long-presses the background wallpaper to enter the home screen editing mode, then navigates through the Customize menu to select color tinting options. The background of this phase is the digital wallpaper of the phone, brightly lit by the screen backlighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 Tim 哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 欸 你知道嗎. [Variety]: 你知道嗎. (2) [Subtitle]: iOS 18 竟然有 隱藏功能. (3) [Subtitle]: 你只要準備好 一個原廠殼. (4) [Subtitle]: 它會因為 你原廠殼 而變色喔. (5) [Subtitle]: 你看我現在 顏色是透明的對不對. (6) [Subtitle]: 把它裝起來. (7) [Subtitle]: 變色了 怎麼做 我現在教你. (8) [Subtitle]: 好 非常簡單 你現在呢 先長按一下桌面. (9) [Subtitle]: 桌面以後呢 左上角編輯按下去. (10) [Subtitle]: 自訂 選擇自訂以後呢. (11) [Subtitle]: 你可以看到 下面這邊 有個不同色調. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後選擇呢 左邊數來第二個. (13) [Subtitle]: 因為 第一個 是跟著你的 手機的主題變. (14) [Subtitle]: 第二個呢 就是跟著你的手機殼啦. (15) [Subtitle]: 選好 就搞定了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator appearing in front of a white wall.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a blue denim-style cap, and a light green t-shirt with text logos.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, solid white studio wall in the physical shots, and a digital iPhone wallpaper in the screen recording segments.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male voice speaking energetic Mandarin at a moderate speed. His pitch is mid-range with positive variability, typical of a professional content creator. Underneath the voice, a light acoustic pop track featuring a strummed guitar and soft piano notes provides a cheerful, inviting atmosphere. The vocal recording is extremely crisp and well-articulated. (2) A distinct, sharp mechanical click sound occurs as the narrator physically installs the phone into its protective case. This transient sound effect is clean and has a short spectral duration, indicating a focused recording. The narrator's voice maintains its friendly and instructional tone, with absolutely no audible background noise or environmental interference from the room. (3) During the subsequent screen-based tutorial segment, several digital pop and ding user interface sound effects are interspersed with the narration. These intentional sound effects are added in post-production to highlight specific navigation points on the mobile interface. The background music continues at a steady, low-volume level, providing a consistent tonal floor throughout the entire instructional delivery.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to teach iPhone users about a hidden customization feature in iOS 18 that allows the operating system's color theme to automatically adjust based on the color of an official Apple phone case. It uses a clear demonstration followed by a step-by-step UI guide to ensure viewers can replicate the effect.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of Apple product features and official accessory compatibility.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Professional tech influencer video with high production quality and clear educational value.
